elements.text: (1) If L1U1 = L2U2 (upper triangular U's with nonzero diagonal, lower triangular L's with unit diagonal), then L1 = L2 and U1 = U2. The LU factorization is unique. (2) If A2 + A = I then A−1 = A + I. (3) If all diagonal entries of A are zero, then A is singular.
